# 9 facts you should know about Bolivia that are positive

1. Bolivia has seven UNESCO World Heritage sites.
2. The Carnival of Oruro is recognized by UNESCO as Intangible Cultural Heritage.
3. The Andean cosmovision of the Kallawaya is also recognized by UNESCO.
4. Salar de Uyuni is the world’s largest salt flat.
5. Bolivia shares Lake Titicaca, the world’s highest lake navigable to large vessels.
6. Bolivia is among the 15 most biodiverse countries in the world.
7. Bolivia and Peru together are recognized as a center of origin for the potato, with more than 4,300 native potato varieties.
8. Bolivia recognizes 36 official Indigenous languages in its constitutional framework.
9. Tiwanaku is one of South America’s great ancient centers and a UNESCO World Heritage site.
